title: Exactly-once signed webhook processing with ordering

difficulty.rationale: Combines webhook authentication, idempotency, per-key sequence ordering, gap buffering, superseded replay ignore, and concurrency-safe exactly-once apply.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: POST /webhook with valid signature acks and applies increment/set events.
Duplicate event_id returns 200 without double apply.
must_not: Advance state across a sequence gap before the missing event arrives.
edge_cases: Out-of-order sequences are buffered then applied in order.
Superseded lower-sequence events are acked without changing state.
Gap events are acked but do not advance last_sequence until filled.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
